title: Render data manifest — version.json data[] (normalised CSV sidecars)
description: One entry per visualisation in the rendered source. Written by viz_data.scan_session and persisted by session.record_render at the session root (latest) and per history entry.

type.description: Specific viz type — chart type for charts, else the fenced-div class.

files.description: Session-relative CSV paths (one, or nodes.csv + edges.csv for diagrams).

page_key.description: Showcase panel key (data-page-key) when known; null otherwise.

rendered.description: false = data shipped but no renderer yet (NEW viz types).
